main.description: One placement of a block (or nested channel) inside a channel — are.na's join table as a first-class record, like app.bsky.feed.like is for posts. The record key is the are.na connection id. Cross-repo connections (my connection pointing at a block record in your repo) are the intended future of this shape.

channel.description: The channel record this connection lives in.

target.description: What was connected. `uri` is present only when the target is mirrored as a local record; foreign or out-of-scope targets keep their are.na identity here without implying a local record exists.

uri.description: The mirrored block/channel record, when it exists.

url.description: Canonical are.na URL of the target.
